The '''''Lonsigar 1''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] destroyed by the ''[[Grey Wolf]]'' around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-05-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire: Official Secrets & Solutions]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
